column1: #note=Example: ECG auto_q_valley training + CE baseline for 5 datasets
#note=Set IMAGENET_DS_ROOT to the directory containing train_data_batch_* and val_data
#note=ecg_tau_end: initial quantile q_start for auto_q_valley (valley detection adapts q each epoch).
#note=  Typical range: 0.3~0.5 for many-class datasets (e.g. ImageNet), 0.6~0.85 for few-class datasets.
#note=  A lower value starts with a wider gate (more samples active); auto_q_valley will adjust from there.
# --- ImageNet-32 (60 epochs, lr=0.01); set IMAGENET_DS_ROOT before submitting ---
